title: cyclophyllum calyculatum
intro: Cyclophyllum calyculatum, also known as the Kanikani tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyclophyllum calyculatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
